title: Sections workforms
excerpt: Is it possible to design a form with sections, or do all the questions have to be on a single page? How can I add sections to a Workforms form?

posts.author: RedGCE (Red )
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to design a form with sections, or do all the questions have to be on a single page? How can I add sections to a Workforms form?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RedGCE,

Welcome to the community!

Are you trying to create a form via the API? If so, we currently don’t have an endpoint to do that.

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: RedGCE (Red )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I want to group the questions of a single extensive form into several segments. Is that possible?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you trying to do this with the API? It currently does not support forms.
